pages.raw_text:
Two more electric passenger trains
were received by the Spokane & Occur
d Alene electric line yesterday and were
taken at once to Occur d'Alene City
where the unloading will take place
Here the cars will be fixed up and
made ready for service. 1t will be
some time before these can be sent
out on the line on regular schedule
on account of the Washington Water
Power company not being ready with
its transformer station. There is not
now enough power to run more than
the one train on the line, and it re-
qnires some two hours to make the
run. When everything is completed
the run can be made in one hour and
three trains will be brought into SER
vice.


Two new cars have been received by
the Washington Water Power COM
pany and will go into commission at
once. They are of the convertible
pattern, with vestibules and folding
doors.
